title: PsychoTerror
description: A psychological horror system that reacts to each player’s behavior, creating unique personal scares and world distortions.
body:
A psychological horror system that punishes only the player who behaves violently.

PsychoTerror adds a dynamic terror meter to Minecraft.
Every player has their own independent psychological state.
If they kill many mobs, their terror level rises… and strange things start happening only to them.

🌑 Their world becomes darker
🌧 It rains only for them
🐄 Animals follow and stare
👻 Ghosts of mobs they killed reappear
🔊 Echoes and ambient sounds whisper behind them

Meanwhile, peaceful players remain completely unaffected.
